name: Structured: Daily Planner Todo
oneLiner: Structured: Daily Planner Todo — визуальный дневной планировщик (timeline дня, задачи + календарь + привычки), iOS
pricing: бесплатно с подпиской Structured Pro (по отзывам)
keyFeatures: Visual day timeline: tasks laid out hour-by-hour on a single vertical timeline
Combine calendar events, to-dos and habits in one daily view
Inbox for quick capture, then plan tasks into the timeline
iCloud/calendar sync, widgets, Apple Watch app
Structured Pro subscription unlocks recurring tasks, icons, themes
